Detective Cyto Kine and Deputy Pip hover with miniature jet packs beside a suspicious focal region inside the liver. Surrounding liver tissue appears more orderly, but the target region shows distorted architecture and ominous self-contained growth. Medium shot with slight push-in, slightly canted angle, warm reds and golds turning uneasy, clean composition, cinematic lighting, highly readable anatomy-inspired environment.
